exports.content: 2D/3D perovskite achieves up to 12.9% efficiency in carbon-based architecture and 14.6% in standard mesoporous solar cells
exports.label: carbon_cell_12_9_pct

exports.content: The 2D/3D interface forms a gradually-organized multi-dimensional structure that provides continuous charge transport pathways while maintaining enhanced stability
exports.label: gradual_interface

exports.content: HTM-free solar cells and modules using hydrophobic carbon electrodes instead of organic hole transporting materials, reducing cost and improving stability
exports.label: htmc_free_config

exports.content: Achieving >10,000 hours stability approaches the market requirement of <10% drop in PCE for at least 1,000 hours on standard accelerated aging tests
exports.label: market_requirements_approach

exports.content: 10x10 cm2 solar modules fabricated by fully printable industrial-scale process deliver 11.2% efficiency stable for >10,000 hours with zero loss in performance measured under controlled standard conditions
exports.label: module_10x10_stable

exports.content: 2D/3D engineered perovskite devices maintain stable performance for over one year, corresponding to >10,000 hours of operation
exports.label: one_year_stability

exports.content: 2D/3D perovskite modules maintain stable performance under controlled standard conditions in the presence of oxygen and moisture
exports.label: oxygen_moisture_tolerant

exports.content: The 2D/3D perovskite architecture is compatible with fully printable industrial-scale processes for large-area module fabrication
exports.label: scalable_printable

exports.content: Engineering a 2D/3D (HOOC(CH2)4NH3)2PbI4/CH3NH3PbI3 perovskite junction creates an exceptional gradually-organized multi-dimensional interface that combines 2D perovskite stability with 3D perovskite charge transport
exports.label: two_d_three_d_interface

exports.content: 2D perovskites exhibit superior stability and water resistance compared to 3D perovskites, preventing hydrolysis and irreversible degradation under moisture
exports.label: two_d_water_resistant
